(crypto-venv) cakidd@cakidd-Legion-5-16IRX9:/opt/msjarvis-rebuild/ms-allis-frontend$ docker ps -a --filter name=jarvis-local-resources-db --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"
docker ps -a --filter name=jarvis-gis-db --format "{{.Names}} {{.Status}}"
jarvis-local-resources-db Up 2 days
(crypto-venv) cakidd@cakidd-Legion-5-16IRX9:/opt/msjarvis-rebuild/ms-allis-frontend$ docker volume ls | grep -E "gis|msjarvis|postgres|local"
local     4b2822114a1ecfb6b6d7fbf321884e9d4711074e0de3892ab4fe172262a2fa0f
local     838215e514a6459652600286d4bbedc28ea2235c9bfa49efaffa176bfa913036
local     643115698e2d39666814fcd3680e36c6c85735732f7682019b783737bbfd409d
local     CORRECT_VOLUME_NAME
local     aaacpe-cultural-data
local     af965d28baf53926de50b7b95821db6ff2819d705867543d548d39c729564583
local     b4b082c14a033362eae87adf27260cdeab3bacafd96759fd0eb45bc343e6bbfe
local     backups_aaacpe-cultural-data
local     chroma_data
local     chroma_onnx_cache
local     d0a4586a446682d16ec4fb29ebf15601e3c85e416e15aed84f46c6eacc970460
local     fa21bd919772d29d8800acd78841a5bf18a93babd5a812e7e878750579867710
local     jarvis-hf-cache
local     msjarvis-rebuild_aaacpe-cultural-data
local     msjarvis-rebuild_chroma_onnx_cache
local     msjarvis-rebuild_gbim_data
local     msjarvis-rebuild_ingest-audit
local     msjarvis-rebuild_ingest-done
local     msjarvis-rebuild_ingest-failed
local     msjarvis-rebuild_ingest-incoming
local     msjarvis-rebuild_jarvis-local-resources-db-data
local     ollama_models
(crypto-venv) cakidd@cakidd-Legion-5-16IRX9:/opt/msjarvis-rebuild/ms-allis-frontend$ grep -A 25 "jarvis-local-resources-db\|jarvis-gis-db" /opt/msjarvis-rebuild/docker-compose.yml \
  | grep -E "image|volumes|POSTGRES_DB|POSTGRES_USER|POSTGRES_PASSWORD|ports" | head -20
    ports:
    volumes:
    image: postgis/postgis:15-3.4
      - POSTGRES_DB=msjarvisgis
      - POSTGRES_USER=postgres
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD=postgres
    ports:
    volumes:
    volumes:
    ports:
    image: msjarvis-toroidal:latest
    ports:
(crypto-venv) cakidd@cakidd-Legion-5-16IRX9:/opt/msjarvis-rebuild/ms-allis-frontend$ sudo bash -c "echo 'host    gisdb           cakidd          172.18.0.0/16           md5' >> /etc/postgresql/16/main/pg_hba.conf"
sudo systemctl reload postgresql
(crypto-venv) cakidd@cakidd-Legion-5-16IRX9:/opt/msjarvis-rebuild/ms-allis-frontend$ # Confirm both entries exist
sudo grep "172.18" /etc/postgresql/16/main/pg_hba.conf
host    all             postgres        172.18.0.0/16           md5
host    all             postgres        172.18.0.0/16           md5
host    gisdb           postgres        172.18.0.0/16           md5
host    msjarvis        postgres        172.18.0.0/16           md5
host    gisdb    gbim    172.18.0.0/16    md5
host    msjarvisgis     cakidd          172.18.0.0/16           md5
host    gisdb           cakidd          172.18.0.0/16           md5
(crypto-venv) cakidd@cakidd-Legion-5-16IRX9:/opt/msjarvis-rebuild/ms-allis-frontend$ # Test from bridge using gisdb (has wv_911_centers, wv_hospitals etc.)
docker exec jarvis-69dgm-bridge python3 -c "
import psycopg2
conn = psycopg2.connect(host='172.18.0.1', port=5432,
    dbname='gisdb', user='cakidd', password='msjarvis')
cur = conn.cursor()
cur.execute('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wv_hospitals')
print('WV hospitals in gisdb:', cur.fetchone()[0])
cur.execute('SELECT COUNT(*) FROM wv_911_centers')
print('WV 911 centers in gisdb:', cur.fetchone()[0])
conn.close()
print('gisdb from Docker bridge: CONFIRMED')
"
WV hospitals in gisdb: 67
WV 911 centers in gisdb: 54
gisdb from Docker bridge: CONFIRMED
(crypto-venv) cakidd@cakidd-Legion-5-16IRX9:/opt/msjarvis-rebuild/ms-allis-frontend$ shp2pgsql -s 32617:4326 -I \
  "/home/cakidd/gis_data/wvgis/staging/unzipped/County_Boundaries_Census_2021_utm83/County_Boundaries_Census_2021_utm83.shp" \
  public.wv_counties \
  | sudo -u postgres psql -d gisdb 2>&1 | tail -5
Field aland is an FTDouble with width 19 and precision 11
Field awater is an FTDouble with width 19 and precision 11
Shapefile type: Polygon
Postgis type: MULTIPOLYGON[2]
ERROR:  current transaction is aborted, commands ignored until end of transaction block
ERROR:  current transaction is aborted, commands ignored until end of transaction block
ERROR:  current transaction is aborted, commands ignored until end of transaction block
ROLLBACK
ANALYZE
(crypto-venv) cakidd@cakidd-Legion-5-16IRX9:/opt/msjarvis-rebuild/ms-allis-frontend$ # Verify columns
sudo -u postgres psql -d gisdb -c "\d wv_counties" | grep -E "geom|name|county|co_"
 countyns | character varying(8)        |           |          | 
 namelsad | character varying(100)      |           |          | 
 geom     | geometry(MultiPolygon,4326) |           |          | 
    "wv_counties_geom_idx" gist (geom)
(crypto-venv) cakidd@cakidd-Legion-5-16IRX9:/opt/msjarvis-rebuild/ms-allis-frontend$ # Spatial test
sudo -u postgres psql -d gisdb -c "
SELECT * FROM wv_counties
WHERE ST_Contains(geom, ST_SetSRID(ST_MakePoint(-80.88723, 37.67186), 4326))
LIMIT 1;" 2>&1 | head -10
 gid | countyns | geoid |    namelsad    | classfp | funcstat |     aland     |    awater     |  intptlat   |  intptlon   |
